headline: Smurfit Westrock plc Results of Annual General Meeting of Shareholders and Filing of Form 8-K Reporting the Same
summary: DUBLIN, May 01, 2026-- Smurfit Westrock plc (the "Company") today filed a Form 8-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (the "SEC") which notes that the Company held its 2026 annual general meeting of shareholders (the "Annual General Meeting") earlier today, May 1, 2026 and that all directors put forward for election at the Annual General Meeting were elected by the shareholders and all other resolutions recommended by the Company's Board of Directors were passed at the Annual Gener

headline: PepsiCo inks 10-year renewable energy deal to cut emissions across Europe
summary: The food and beverage giant’s virtual power purchase agreement with Statkraft is expected to reduce 32,000 metric tons of its carbon dioxide emissions annually.

content.title: PepsiCo inks 10-year renewable energy deal to cut emissions across Europe
content.summary: The food and beverage giant’s virtual power purchase agreement with Statkraft is expected to reduce 32,000 metric tons of its carbon dioxide emissions annually.

headline: Smurfit Westrock (SW) Valuation Check After Mixed Recent Returns And Analyst Discount Signals
summary: How Smurfit Westrock’s recent returns frame the current setup Smurfit Westrock (SW) has been trading around $39.43 after a mixed performance, with a 1-day gain of 2.7% contrasting with weaker returns over the past week, month, past 3 months, and year. For you as an investor, that backdrop, combined with current revenue of US$31.2b and net income of US$380m, raises a straightforward question: does the recent share performance align with the company’s latest fundamentals and value score of...
